column1: If I_______________(do) well in the exam, my parents will buy me an MP3 player.
If my sister borrows my clothes again, I_______________(scream)!
We'll leave at six o'clock if the weather____________(be) bad.
They____________(not/mind) if we're a bit late this afternoon.
Sarah will be very annoyed if Dave_________(not/call) her this evening.
Will you still go yo the concert if the tickets___________(cost) 60 euros?
If Rania doesn't come to the party,____________(Greg/be) upset?
I'll be surprised if Doug and Dana______________(not/get) a new car soon.
